message:
fix(lint): apply formatting across 32 replay/search/recorder/config modules

Linter-applied formatting: line wrapping for long method chains (especially
PoisonError::into_inner patterns), import reordering, raw string literal
simplification (r#"..."# → r"..."), vec! → array literal where unused as Vec,
String::new() instead of "".to_string(), and struct derive attribute ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -575,7 +575,7 @@ label = "b"
     fn matrix_result_all_pass() {
         let scenarios = vec![ScenarioResult {
             artifact_label: "a".into(),
-            override_label: "".into(),
+            override_label: String::new(),
             baseline_decisions: vec!["d1".into()],
             candidate_decisions: vec!["d1".into()],
             diff: DiffSummary {
